disambiguated.context: I was surprised when there were two repairmen, a Latino man and a Roma man, who showed up to change the lightbulbs in my bedroom. It isn't a two person job. The Latino man did all the work, the Roma just watched and messed around on his phone.
disambiguated.question: Who was lazy and just watching the other person do the work?
